title: heterotheca trichophylla
intro: Heterotheca trichophylla, also known as greenthread, is a flowering plant native to North America, belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of greenthread include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and improve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). Greenthread can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in topical creams and salves for its anti-inflammatory properties.
